task: Clone https://github.com/obra/superpowers to ~/.config/opencode/superpowers, then create directory ~/.config/opencode/plugins, then symlink ~/.config/opencode/superpowers/.opencode/plugins/superpowers.js to ~/.config/opencode/plugins/superpowers.js, then symlink ~/.config/opencode/superpowers/skills to ~/.config/opencode/skills/superpowers, then restart opencode.
